case_title: RUTHERFORD, DONNA L. VS MARDIROSIAN, VARUJAN IND/& DBA JEWELRY EXCHANGE CO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARDIROSIAN, VARUJAN IND/& DBA JEWELRY EXCHANGE CO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RUTHERFORD, DONNA L. AS TO DEFENDANT MARDIROSIAN, VARUJAN IND/& DBA JEWELRY EXCHANGE CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUTHERFORD, DONNA L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARDIROSIAN, VARUJAN IND/& DBA JEWELRY EXCHANGE CO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-25-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAY-22-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED 5/22/01 10:00 AM. $10.00 FEE PAID.
